html:
Wood Fences are wall-like Structures located in the Structures Tab. 3 Twigs and 1 Rope are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a Hammer or any weapon. Together with Wood Gates, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a Mob. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it.

Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement.

Trivia

  • Wood Fences were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Willow's quote for the wood fence is likely a reference to the book The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.
  • It is the first stackable item to get a Skin.
    • Skinned fences and not skinned ones do not stack in the Inventory.

Gallery

  • Wood Fence as seen in the poster for the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.
  • Wilson standing next to a Wood Fence.
  • A fence with Wood Gates used to pen some Rabbits.
Craftable ItemsStructures

Wood Fences are wall-like Structures located in the Structures Tab. 3 Twigs and 1 Rope are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a Hammer or any weapon. Together with Wood Gates, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a Mob. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it.
Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Wood Fences were introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Willow's quote for the wood fence is likely a reference to the book The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.
It is the first stackable item to get a Skin.
Skinned fences and not skinned ones do not stack in the Inventory.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hàng rào Gỗ là những Công trình giống như bức tường nằm trong Tab Công trình. Cần 3 Cành Cây và 1 Dây Thừng để chế tạo 6 Hàng Rào Gỗ. Chúng dễ cháy và có thể bị phá hủy bằng Búa hoặc bất kỳ vũ khí nào. Cùng với Cổng Gỗ, chúng có thể được sử dụng cho cả mục đích trang trí và làm lồng cho Mob. Tuy nhiên, Mob bay không thể bị bẫy bằng Hàng rào Gỗ vì chúng sẽ bay qua hàng rào đó.

'''Wood Fences''' are wall-like [[Structures]] located in the [[Structures Tab]]. 3 [[Twigs]] and 1 [[Rope]] are required to craft 6 Wood Fences. They are flammable and can be destroyed with a [[Hammer]] or any weapon. Together with [[Wood Gate]]s, they can be used both for decorative uses and for making a cage for a [[Mob]]. However, flying Mobs cannot be trapped using Wood Fences, as they will simply fly over it.

Fences seem to try to connect to adjacent fences, and rotate by a 45 degree angle every time. This allows for more practical placement.
__NOTOC__
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Wood Fences were introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 3rd, 2016 - Cute Fuzzy Animals|Cute Fuzzy Animals]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. They were later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
* Willow's quote for the wood fence is likely a reference to the book ''[[Wikipedia:The Adventures of Tom Sawyer|The Adventures of Tom Sawyer]]''.
* It is the first stackable item to get a [[Skin]].
** Skinned fences and not skinned ones do not stack in the [[Inventory]].
